title: Why Choose OSMEA?
description: OSMEA is not just a framework — it's an ecosystem for building the future of mobile e-commerce.

features.title: Platform Agnostic
features.description: Connects with Shopify, WooCommerce • RESTful by design — headless friendly

features.title: Modular & Composable
features.description: Each module is plug & play • Build only what you need. No bloat.

features.title: Enterprise-Ready
features.description: CI/CD pipelines, test coverage, versioning • Built for scale. Not a toy framework.

features.title: Themeable & Customizable
features.description: Complete UI kit: Text, Colors, Buttons, Cards • Override everything. Your brand, your rules.

features.title: Cross-Platform
features.description: Flutter-powered single codebase • Native look & performance on iOS & Android

features.title: Secure & Scalable
features.description: Role-based access, modular APIs • Built with Clean Architecture & async-safety
